questions.question: Statements: All cats are animals. All animals are living. Which conclusion follows?
questions.solution: Step 1: Apply syllogism rules. Step 2: 'All cats are living' is True. Answer: True.

questions.question: Statements: Some doctors are teachers. All teachers are graduates. Which conclusion follows?
questions.solution: Step 1: Apply syllogism rules. Step 2: 'Some doctors are graduates' is True. Answer: True.
